MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-28-2002 Off Calendar

MOTION To Vacate Default Judgment And To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Apr-23-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Philip S. Horne, Esq., ATTORNEY AT LAW, (415) 235-7445, appeared on behalf of defendant and moving party Wanda Harrison. There were no other appearances.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as its order: the Harrison Family's motion to vacate default judgment and to set aside default is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The answer shall be filed no later than the close of business on April 23, 2002. An order was signed in open court. (JJM) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855
